pkgmetadata.longdescription: librosa is a Python package for music and audio analysis. It provides the building blocks necessary to create music information retrieval systems, including feature extraction, spectrogram computation, pitch tracking, beat detection, and audio effects processing.
librosa是一个用于音乐和音频分析的Python包。它提供了创建音乐信息检索 系统所需的基本构建模块，包括特征提取、频谱图计算、音高跟踪、节拍检测 和音频效果处理。
